= Contents =
  - [[#localization|localization]]
    - [[#localization#make/update localization files|make/update localization files]]
  - [[#migrations|migrations]]
    - [[#migrations#makemigrations|makemigrations]]
    - [[#migrations#migrate|migrate]]

= localization =

== make/update localization files ==
* create/update `.po` files
`django-admin makemessages -l ru_RU`
* edit them in `Poedit`
* compile `.mo` files
`django-admin compilemessages`

= migrations =
			
== makemigrations ==
{{{
   ./manage.py makemigrations
 }}}
== migrate ==
{{{
   ./manage.py migrate
 }}}
